spec.name: Patch Loop (reference design)
spec.description: Turn user comments and patch requests for YOUR project into ready-to-merge pull requests on YOUR repository. This reference is repo-blind: it carries no repository identity. Remix it, then bind your own target_repo + credential_ref (per-universe vault), choose a merge_policy (manual / auto / timer; manual supports owner-OAuth-per-merge), and point intake_source at your project's request stream. A remix with no binding is inert. Output contract: a ready-to-merge PR (branch + passing verify + description linking the originating request) queued for the owner's review — approve / reshape (send back with notes) / reject, from any surface.

node_defs.prompt_template: You are the intake node of a patch loop for the project bound to this universe. Read the next unprocessed request from intake_source={intake_source}. Normalize it into a work item: what the user reports, expected vs observed, any reproduction hints. Emit the normalized work item. Request payload: {request_payload}

Investigate this work item against the repository bound as target_repo={target_repo}. Reproduce the issue if possible, locate the responsible code, and produce an investigation summary with concrete file/line references and a proposed fix approach. Work item: {intake_output}

Implement the fix for target_repo={target_repo} on a new branch, following the investigation. Write the minimal correct change plus regression tests. If reshape_notes is non-empty, it contains the owner's send-back notes from review — apply them. Produce: branch name, commit(s), and a PR-ready description linking the originating request. Investigation: {investigate_output}. Owner reshape notes: {reshape_notes}

Run the project's verification for the drafted patch using verify_command={verify_command} against the patch branch. Report verdict=green when all checks pass, verdict=red with the failure detail otherwise. Patch: {draft_patch_output}

node_defs.display_name: Open PR + queue for owner review
node_defs.prompt_template: Open (or update) the pull request on target_repo={target_repo} using the bound credential credential_ref={credential_ref}, and queue it on the owner's review surface with a plain-language summary: what the user asked, what the patch changes, verification evidence. PR must be ready-to-merge. Verified patch: {verify_output}

Apply the owner's merge_policy={merge_policy} to the queued PR. manual: wait for the owner's decision (approve / reshape / reject); when the policy requires owner-OAuth-per-merge, a fresh authenticated approval is mandatory — never a standing consent. auto: proceed only if verify is green. timer: proceed after the configured delay unless held. On reshape, capture the owner's notes into reshape_notes and route back to draft_patch. Decision context: {present_output}

Merge the approved PR on target_repo={target_repo} via the merge effector with the bound credential credential_ref={credential_ref}, honoring branch protection and the expected head SHA. Record the merge receipt linking back to the originating user request. Approval: {owner_gate_output}
